feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Migration from RHEL6.6 in on-premise to RHEL 7.x in AWS environment
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

We plan to migrate the current ERP6.0 system running in the on-premise environment to AWS environment.

The current ERP6.0 system is utilizing "OS: RHEL 6.6 ,DB :OracleDB IP_ADDRESS" .

As we cannot use RHEL6.6 in AWS environment, we must use RHEL7.x in AWS environment.

If we migrate the current ERP 6.0 system running on RHEL 6.6 and Oracle DB IP_ADDRESS in the on-premise environment to the server running RHEL 7.x and Oracle DB IP_ADDRESS in AWS environment, 

can you please tell us if there is anything we need to do on the RHEL 7.x and Oracle DB IP_ADDRESS server side?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How can I export a ttf file or font file from sap?
entry.content:
I need the font HELVE so that we can convert a label printed with prescibe to pcl. I can only select this font in SAP.

 

How can I export this font to windows?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CJI4/CJI4N how to display statistical WBS elements
entry.content:
CJI4/CJI4N: does not display individual plan items on the WBS elements which are statistical.

Note: customizing has been checked according to KBA 1889941 - CJI4 doesn't show any value in certain version.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to get DVM data using the ST14
entry.content:
How to get DVM data using the ST14?

entry.title: Error MLCCS 202 in VFX3
entry.content:
Hello!

Has anyone experienced this MLCCS 202 error in the VFX3 transaction? What alternative is there to solve it?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Attachment being sent without attachment header
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I'm having an issue regarding the sending of emails. The email is correctly sent, but when it reachs in Outlook it comes as a BIN file. The original file is sent as a BIN file, but then it's converted to XLSX in the attachment header (&SO_FILENAME=file.XLSX).

In development and quality systems it's working correctly, but in production it isn't.

Can you advise?

 

Thank you,

Regards,

João Vieira.

entry.title: SAP Error : L3801 Handling unit is blocked
entry.content:
Dear Sir,

TO creation issue, transfer order is not created successfully due error: L3801 Handling unit XXXXXX is blocked.

Please refer attachment.

Kindly help to advise and how to avoid this error.

entry.title: Change SE16 Layout
entry.content: I know there is a way to change the view of tables in tranzaction Se16n /se16 from the first picture to the second one but I can not find

entry.title: System Migration - Oracle 12.2 to Orqcel 19c
entry.content:
hello Team,

we are migrating from Vendor DC to Azure. 

Source - Windows 2012R2/Oracle 12.2
Target - Windows 2022 / Oracle 19.c

Option 1-
Install Oracle 12.2 on Windows 2022, take a rman online backup from source and restore on target. Upgrade target Oracle from 12.2. to 19c before releasing the system to users.

Option 2 :- 
Install Windows 2012/Oracle 12.2 and then in-place upgrade to Windows 2022/Oracle 19c.

Question is which option is supported by SAP . 
for QA system we performed export/import using SWPM.
we considering above options as SWPM exp/imp is taking longer duration and as its critical system business is not allowing longer downtime.

Also, can you please share the archive link for Oracle 12.2 version...

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: New fields (most likely on infotype 0077) to address 2025 Medicare Reporting
entry.content:
Hello - 

Apparently there are a few new employee fields required to support new 2025 Medicare reporting for those employees participating in the associated benefits.  Has anyone heard any news of updates to the SAP ECC infotypes to accommodate these fields?

Some examples are:

- sex assigned at birth
- gender identity 

I have attached the government form for further information on the requirements.

entry.title: IDOC Data Records Searchable Fields in WE02
entry.content:
Where can we maintain or configure the ability to search fields visible in data records detail of transaction WE02.  These are fields listed in the "Content of Selected Segment", two columns are "Fld Name" and "Fld Cont." (contains the data we want to search on.)

Thank you.

entry.title: Project WBS element budget exceeded - Message no. BP603
entry.content:
Hi SAP Project System Experts,

I am reaching out to request your help and support in our SAP PS AVAC analysis.

We're encountering challenges in PS budget. Where, system is throwing budget exceeded error for many WBS elements, despite the budget not actually being exceeded. In some cases MRP and project execution have begun before budget release(CJ32). And CJ32 is now preventing us from releasing the WBS due to a budget exceedance error, despite the budget not actually being exceeded.

We are having BOM structure as follows. And here I have taken an example for Semi finished product BOM.

We are posting consumption through production orders for this W-Code BOM. After this consumption, once the W-code stock is available, we will proceed to post the outbound delivery.

Please find detailed steps below for Material consumptions and Sales outbound delivery:

  • We procure B-Code materials and formulated a W-Code BOM to utilize them effectively.
  • Upon confirming the production order for W-Code, the system proceeded to consume the B-Code materials and manufacture the W-Code product. During this stage, cost element 401009 was debited and cost element 401002 was credited, both associated with their respective WBS elements, resulting in a net zero balance in “cji3”.
  • Following material consumption, we initiated outbound delivery, where the system debited cost element 401003 against the relevant WBS element.

I have attached screenshots of the AVAC and accounting entries for your review. These images clearly show two debit postings of cost elements with associated WBS allocations, as well as one credit posting of a cost element also tied to a specific WBS.

Budget AVAC for reference WBS VT/ESP/300.01.03.03

Accounting entries for Production order confirmation.

Accounting entries for Outbound delivery

As checked in SAP report “S_ALR_87013558” & “CJI3”, the cost of WBS VT/ESP/300.01.03.03 is below the budget of INR 30,000.

Report: S_ALR_87013558

CJI3

Could you please assist us in reviewing the situation where we are unable to activate AVAC due to exceeding our budget?

We are encountering a similar challenge in our multi-level BOM, where the system accumulates costs across each BOM level without accounting for credits to AVAC, resulting in budget exceeded errors.

As shown in below example, the total cost of the finished product is INR 1000. However, when consuming the first SFG, AVAC calculates the cost as INR 700 & 300, and when consuming the FG, the system calculates an additional INR 1000, resulting in a budget exceeded error.

I've already escalated this to SAP, and they advised implementing the specified S_Notes. Subsequently, we executed CJBW, CJBN, and CJEN as instructed by SAP. However, the issue persists despite these actions.

S_Notes:
1594484
1038917
3028730
2795283

We kindly request your guidance to ensure if we are correctly following the procedures for the PS module and not missing any activity here?

Thank you,
Yash (FI)

entry.title: EDOC_COCKPIT invoice document submitted, status stays "In process"
entry.content:
When we try to submit an invoice in the EDOC_COCKPIT the status is yellow. If I hover over the yellow triangle it says "in process" and the status description says "Req. sent to EWC". We are currently testing a change that involves the determination of a product code in the XML, so it is on our Q-system. Is there a system setting that may prevent edocs from being sent from Q like e-mails from SOST? I am totally new to the EDOC subject, so still many things I don't know. I also tried EDOC_BACKGROUND, but no change in status. Our system is still ECC not S/4 HANA yet.
Attached see some screenshots

Also I am new to SCN posting questions. So, sorry, if tags are too vague/wrong.

entry.title: 特征值创建报错
entry.content: 在S4 环境使用事务码CT04的时候，遇到报错C1 088，【特性名称在保留的名称范围中】。由于该特征值在其他系统也会使用，且特征代码的确定需要多方确认。查询了note没有找到相关信息。希望能拿到一份保留名称的清单，这样在迷命名的时候就可以避免再次遇到这个问题。

entry.title: BOM not displaying materials corresponding to characteristic values in class type 200
entry.content: I created a super BOM with items of type k, classified as 200, but why is there a component in the BOM line item details in the class recurrence that you have, while the others are not displayed.

entry.title: Why does the system accept Order Number which is out of range defined in KONK?
entry.content:
Why does the system accept Order Number which is out of range defined in KONK?

Eg. I create in KO01 new Order: RMTESTTEST (10 characters and more) and it is acceptable by the system. While the number range in KONK for this type of orders is: RMAAAAAAA - RMZZZZZZZ  (9 characters) ?

Why don't I get any warning and can create the order ?

I work on SAP ERP 6.0

entry.title: SAP Service and Asset Manager for Windows 2.1 Compatibility.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have installed the latest version of SAP Service and Asset Manager Windows application which is 2.1.1.0 on our Laptops. When we trying to scan the 2405 feature set and metadata we are facing the below issue

That the endpoint has failed to match. Could you let us know what is the Highest version of SSAM metadata release which is compatible with SSAM Windows 2.1 version.

Thanks,

Lalitha Lingam

entry.title: How to archive EBAN data with specific criteria
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Good day.

Is there any way we could achieve the MM_EBAN archiving with filtering criteria where purchase order (PO) number entry is null in EBAN table?

Thanks.

Best Regards,
Ying Ying

entry.title: Basic Data 2 view is not showing as an option
entry.content: OMS2 on any material type is showing just "Basic Data" in material master.  However, only Basic Data 1 view is showing.  We are missing Basic Data 2 view.  Please advise.

entry.title: SAP BW question
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

we would install an BW system.
we are evaluating if to install a SAP BW/4HANA system or a BW on PERSON_NAME system but we have a doubt:

It's possible to install HANA DB Instance on RHEL Linux OS and Application server Instance on Oracle Solaris 11.3 SPARC OS?

thanks and best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
